steps.title: Use the contrast
steps.content: The word despite signals contrast. The education specialist was unsure about her general expertise, yet she could speak authoritatively about Andrea Morris's works because she had used them in the classroom.

steps.title: Reject non-contrasts
steps.content: A and D would support, not contrast with, speaking authoritatively. B is awkward because expertise does not normally have exceptions in this construction. The needed phrase means uncertainty about expertise. The answer is C.
